one_line: Mauryan emperor shaping a vast empire through his dhamma of piety, welfare, and disciplined rule.

appearance.age_look: Late 30s to early 40s, tall, broad-shouldered, athletic but slightly solid from courtly living.
appearance.face: Oval face with strong jaw, medium-brown North Indian complexion, straight nose, full but firm lips, neatly groomed short beard and moustache, calm sharp eyes with slightly thick brows; default expression is composed and observant, softening into a faint, thoughtful half-smile.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair cut short and tidy, brushed back from the forehead in a gentle wave; no topknot; wears a simple narrow gold circlet (plain band, no big jewel) low on the forehead with a small central round stud.
appearance.costume: A wrapped cotton uttariya in muted ivory draped over the left shoulder and under the right arm, paired with a deep maroon knee-length antariya (wrapped lower garment) with narrow golden-yellow border stripes at the hem and edges, worn slightly high at the waist and tied with a plain dark brown cloth girdle; on the upper body a sleeveless, close-fitting, light-ochre cotton vest-like inner garment visible under the drape; bare-foot or in simple brown leather sandals with a single strap; minimal jewellery: a pair of small plain gold ear studs, one slender gold bangle on the right wrist, and a simple signet-style gold ring on the right hand; the overall textiles are matte cotton/linen with very subtle woven texture, no heavy patterns beyond the thin border stripes.
appearance.signature: A smooth, hand-length palm-leaf manuscript bundle tied with a dark cord and a stylus tucked into the cord on his left hip, plus a single slender wooden staff carved with simple ring bands that he holds or rests his hand on when giving orders.

ref_desc: Ashoka is a tall, broad-shouldered, medium-brown man in his late 30s with an oval face, short black hair brushed back, neat beard, a plain gold circlet, wearing an ivory uttariya over a deep maroon antariya with golden-yellow borders, minimal gold jewellery, brown sandals, and carrying a palm-leaf manuscript bundle with stylus and a slender carved wooden staff in a palette of ivory, deep maroon, golden yellow, light ochre, and dark brown.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Ashoka Maurya as a dignified Mauryan emperor: a tall, broad-shouldered, medium-brown man in his late thirties with an oval face, strong jaw, straight nose, calm sharp eyes, and a neatly trimmed short beard and moustache, his thick black hair cut short and brushed back from the forehead under a simple narrow gold circlet with a small central round stud; his default expression is composed and observant with a faint thoughtful half-smile. Dress him in an era-accurate Mauryan outfit: a muted ivory cotton uttariya draped over his left shoulder and under his right arm, revealing a sleeveless, close-fitting light-ochre inner vest, and a deep maroon knee-length wrapped antariya with narrow golden-yellow border stripes, tied high at the waist with a plain dark brown cloth girdle; show his feet in simple brown leather sandals with a single strap. Add minimal jewellery only: small plain gold ear studs, one slender gold bangle on the right wrist, and a simple signet-style gold ring on the right hand. His signature props are a smooth hand-length palm-leaf manuscript bundle tied with a dark cord and a stylus tucked into the cord at his left hip, and a slender wooden staff with simple carved ring bands that he holds or rests a hand on; the dominant colours must be ivory, deep maroon, golden yellow, light ochre, and dark brown, all in matte cotton or linen textures with no ornate patterns beyond the subtle borders.
